{{Infobox location
|name=Wonderland
|type=Dream world
|location=Below the [[Rabbit Hole]]
}}

== Overview ==
'''Wonderland''' is the surreal realm Alice reaches through the [[Rabbit Hole]]. Its logic is dream-logic: sizes shift, animals speak, and the [[Court of Hearts]] holds absurd trials.


[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Locations (Book 1)]]
